title: KORAD Set of 4 Antique Gold Plant Pots 16 cm, 18 cm, 21 cm, 26 cm - Decorative Planters in 4 Sizes of 16 cm, 18 cm, 21 cm, 26 cm for Flowers, Herbs, Plant Compositions. OSL S4/114
features: Choice of 12 patterns/colours of the planters. The set does not contain flowers. Planters made of high quality plastic, very stable, with high decorative value. Aesthetic, easy to clean and suitable for interiors of all styles.
Elegant, modern decorative planters accentuate the plants beautifully. They are also good for public areas: offices, receptions, study, conference rooms, hotels, restaurants.
♻ The planters are made from 100% recycled plastic and then covered with a strong, high-quality foil with texture of antique gold.
The planters are waterproof. They can be placed on wooden furniture. The planters do not have drainage holes. You can buy planters with drainage holes in 6 sizes.
Each planter is decorated by hand and subjected to strict quality control.
description: KORAD planters with integrated saucers for indoor use. Made of high-quality plastic. Very stable, decorative planter. The planters are made from 100% recycled plastic and then covered with high-quality, strong film in different textures. Our product is environmentally friendly. Our company is licensed for the acceptance and recycling of plastics. We have high-tech facilities to clean plastics and for the recycling RORORORORORORound Planters are an eternally fashionable classic. Aesthetically pleasing, easy to clean and suitable for all interiors, they bring out the qualities of plants wonderfully. The shiny, smooth surface gives it an elegant appearance, brings variety to the designed room and attracts attention. Simple, clear shapes harmonise perfectly with different interior styles. The planters have no drainage holes. However, they are equipped with two points where you can make your own drainage, or you can buy ready-made planters with drainage holes at our other auctions. Planters with stand, ideal for flowers, plants and herbs. Available in many patterns. UV resistant - long-lasting colour under exposure to light. Waterproof, can be placed on wooden furniture. These planters make a perfect addition to your interior. You can put any plants in our planters and adapt them to different light and moisture conditions. They are perfect for plant compositions with multiple plant species. Each planter is decorated by hand and subjected to strict quality control.
